End of Term Newsletter · 2025/2026

A Term of Growth,
Grit & Glory

Reflecting on an extraordinary second term — rich with academic achievements, memorable events, and the continued flourishing of our remarkable Taqwa community.

2 Term
Scroll
From the School

An Exceptional
Second Term

All praise is due to Almighty Allah, whose blessings continue to guide, protect, and elevate our school, our families, and every student in our care. We are truly grateful.

The second term of 2025/2026 was nothing short of extraordinary. From the quiet dedication shown in classrooms to the bright energy of our competitions and events, the spirit of Taqwa has never shone more vividly. Our students stepped up — in learning, in leadership, and in character.

We have remained steadfast in delivering our carefully reviewed curriculum, with teaching and learning closely supervised to uphold the high standards our community has come to expect. Every lesson, every activity, and every interaction has been guided by our mission: to nurture well-rounded, purposeful, and God-conscious learners.

"Excellence is not a destination — it is the standard we set, and then surpass, every single term."
94.6%
Exam Mastery
4
Major Events
2nd
Term 2025/26

This term, we witnessed prefects step into their roles with dignity and conviction, budding scientists illuminate the stage at Science Week, mathematicians battle brilliantly at Taqwapedia, and spellers compete with remarkable composure at the Spelling Bee semi-finals. These are the moments that define the Taqwa experience.

We thank our parents for their unwavering partnership, our staff for their dedication, and our students — the heart of it all — for making this term one to remember.

Learning & Results

Academics & End-of-Term
Examination Results

Our second term has been defined by consistent academic rigour and an encouraging upward trajectory in student performance. Teaching and learning have remained tightly aligned with our reviewed curriculum — and the results speak for themselves.

Term 2 · Collective Excellence Index

94.6%
Overall Examination Mastery

A remarkable collective achievement — reflecting the dedication of our students, the quality of our teaching staff, and the supportive environment fostered across every class. This figure represents the average performance across all end-of-term assessments, and we are proud of every single point earned.

🖥️

Access Your Report on the School Portal

End-of-term reports will be available online on the school's portal on Tuesday in sha Allah. Parents will be notified as soon as the results are successfully published. Then, existing students and parents may log in with their login credentials to have access.

Moments That Mattered

Remarkable
Highlights

Second term was a canvas of colour, competition, and community. Here are the events that lit up our term — captured in moments that will live long in the memory of every Taqwa student.

Leadership & Honour
Decoration of School Prefects

Four outstanding students were officially decorated as the Taqwa High School Prefects for the 2025/2026 academic year — a moment of immense pride, responsibility, and recognition. Selected for their integrity, academic standing, and leadership potential, they now carry the torch of student governance, service, and example. The corridors of Taqwa are in excellent hands.

01
The full prefect body — representing every student with pride and purpose
Poise, dedication, and a vision for the school
Ready to lead, ready to serve
A formidable team of leaders — a testament to what Taqwa molds its students to become
STEM & Innovation
Taqwa Science Week 2026

Science came alive this term as Taqwa students donned their lab coats and let curiosity lead the way. From live chemical demonstrations that drew gasps from the audience to experiments that bridged theory and real-world understanding, Science Week was a celebration of inquiry, discovery, and the sheer joy of learning. Our young scientists reminded us all: the future is in good hands.

02
Students conduct a live chemical demonstration — science that sparks wonder and lights up the room
Mathematics & Competition
Taqwapedia 2026

Equations filled the air and mental agility was on full display at this year's Taqwapedia — our beloved annual Mathematics Competition that brings together the sharpest minds from both the Junior and Senior categories. Students battled through fast-paced rounds of problem-solving, reasoning, and numerical mastery, watched by a captivated audience. Winners were celebrated, prizes awarded, and every participant walked away having proved their mettle.

03
All six category winners — each one a champion in their own right
A well-earned prize — the reward of discipline and mathematical mastery
Numbers don't lie — and neither does excellence
Smiles, prizes, and the glow of achievement
Language & Literacy
Spelling Bee 2026 — Semi-Finals

Words, nerves, and nerves of steel — our annual Spelling Bee competition had it all. This year, the tournament progressed through Preliminary, Qualifying, and Semi-Final rounds across both Junior and Senior categories. The competition raised the bar with every round as students spelled their way through increasingly complex vocabulary with impressive composure, confidence, and command of the English language. We eagerly await the grand finals!

04
The Spelling Bee Semi-Finals — where every letter counts and every word tells a story of preparation
Standards We Uphold

Character & Well-Being

🤲

Student Conduct

The hallmarks of a Taqwa student — honesty, patience, respect, and compassion — are not just rules, they are values we live by. We call on every student to carry these virtues beyond the school gate, into their homes, communities, and the world at large.

👔

Dress Code & Appearance

A smart appearance is a sign of a prepared mind. All students are required to return in complete and correct uniform from day one of the third term. No half-measures — we take pride in how we present ourselves as representatives of Taqwa.

✨

Personal Hygiene

Standards for hair, nails, and general cleanliness will be strictly maintained upon resumption. A healthy student is a focused student — we invest in well-being as much as we invest in learning.

Financial Matters

School Fees & Payment Policy

Timely fee payment ensures uninterrupted access to quality education. We kindly request all parents and guardians to make arrangements ahead of resumption.

📋

Payment Before Resumption Day

All school fees are due on or before the first day of resumption. Parents are required to present evidence of payment at the Accounts Office to receive clearance for classes. Students without valid payment confirmation will not be permitted to join classes until fees are settled. We appreciate your understanding and prompt cooperation.

Looking Ahead

Term 3 Resumption

The third and final term of the 2025/2026 academic year is just around the corner. Mark your calendars — a fresh chapter awaits. Let's finish the year strong.

May 2026
3
Sunday
Boarders Return Boarding students are expected to check in on Sunday, May 3rd. Please arrive within the designated check-in window and come fully prepared for the term.
May 2026
4
Monday
Classes Commence for All All students — day and boarding — are expected in school on Monday, May 4th. Classes begin promptly. Come ready, come early, come excellent.
